description_long: This ornate sconce features a central mounting canopy in a muted gold color, from which a series of elegantly curved arms radiate outward. Each arm supports a lampshade with a pleated, tan fabric exterior and decorative trim, giving the fixture a classic, vintage appearance. The arms are adorned with pastel green and lavender scrollwork, adding a touch of whimsical sophistication. Decorative finials and bulbous accents in soft blue hues are interspersed along the arms, enhancing the overall visual richness. The fixture is designed to hold multiple light bulbs, each concealed beneath its own lampshade. The combination of fabric, metal, and glass elements creates a luxurious and inviting aesthetic suitable for upscale urban interiors.
description: A vintage-style, multi-arm sconce with tan pleated lampshades, pastel scrollwork, and decorative blue accents, radiating from a gold ceiling mount.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical arrangement of all lampshades and decorative scrollwork, with the central canopy and arms clearly visible.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing the depth of the arms and the layered arrangement of the lampshades and scrollwork.
description_view_2: Another angled view highlighting the curvature of the arms and the distribution of decorative blue finials.
description_view_3: Similar to previous views, this angle emphasizes the symmetry and ornate detailing of the fixture's arms and shades.
attribute_fixture_design: Vintage and ornate, this fixture features pleated fabric shades, pastel scrollwork, and decorative finials, evoking a classic and elegant style with whimsical touches.
